no_changes_rationale:
status: needs_investigation
reason: The bead target is stale on this branch. `cli/internal/agent/agent_usage.go` does not exist here; the live usage implementation is in `cli/cmd/agent_usage.go:175-487`, and it is still exercised by `cli/cmd/agent_usage_test.go:39-168`. The GraphQL provider code also still depends on the internal agent usage helpers at `cli/internal/server/graphql/resolver_providers.go:143-148`, `248-257`, `415-487`. Removing the current usage aggregators would delete live behavior rather than dead code, so this cleanup cannot be applied safely without a fresh audit of the current branch state.
